---
title: "566 Project Data Exploration"
author: "North Carpenter"
date: "2026-05-12"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = '/Users/NorthCarpenter/Documents/Sort/School/MS Stats/566 Project')

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
```

Importing Data

```{r}
#files <- list.files("/Users/NorthCarpenter/Documents/Sort/School/MS Stats/566 Project/FARS2023NationalCSV", pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

#list2023 <- lapply(files, read.csv)

path <- '/Users/NorthCarpenter/Documents/Sort/School/MS Stats/566 Project/FARS2023NationalCSV/accident.csv'
accident2023 <- read.csv(path, header = TRUE)

path <- '/Users/NorthCarpenter/Documents/Sort/School/MS Stats/566 Project/FARS2012NationalCSV/ACCIDENT.csv'
accident2012 <- read.csv(path, header = TRUE)
```

```{r}
head(accident2023)
```

Pretty Picture
```{r}
accident2023noLat <- accident2023 |>
  filter(STATENAME != "Alaska",
         LATITUDE > 24, LATITUDE < 72,
         LONGITUD > -180, LONGITUD < -65)


my_sf <- st_as_sf(accident2023noLat, coords = c('LONGITUD', 'LATITUDE'))

my_sf <- st_set_crs(my_sf, 4326)

#Plot it:

ggplot(my_sf) + 
  geom_sf(aes(color = STATENAME), size = 0.01) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r}
accident2023seattle <- accident2023 |>
  filter(STATENAME == "Washington",
         LATITUDE > 24, LATITUDE < 72,
         LONGITUD > -180, LONGITUD < -65)

axSeattleMap <- st_as_sf(accident2023seattle, coords = c('LONGITUD', 'LATITUDE'))

axSeattleMap <- st_set_crs(axSeattleMap, 4326)

#Plot it:

ggplot(axSeattleMap) + 
  geom_sf(aes(color = FATALS), size = 1) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r}
accident2023 %>% filter(FATALS > 5)
```


```{r}
fatals_table <- accident2023 |>
  group_by(STATENAME) |>
  mutate(total = n()) |>
  group_by(STATENAME, FATALS) |>  
  summarise(pct = n() / first(total), 
            total = first(total),        # keep total
            .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(FATALS >= 1) |>
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = FATALS,
    values_from = pct,
    names_prefix = "fatals_",
    values_fill = 0
  )

fatals_table
```


```{r}
nrow(accident2023)

missingUniuqeEval <- function(df)
{
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), as.character)) %>%
    pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "value") %>%
    group_by(column) %>%
    summarise(
      num_blank = sum(is.na(value) | value == "", na.rm = TRUE),
      num_None = sum(is.na(value) | value == "None", na.rm = TRUE),
      num_unique  = n_distinct(value)
    )
  return(df)
}

uniques2023 <- lapply(list2023, function(df) missingUniuqeEval(df))
```

```{r}
uniques2023[9]
```
